disaster.title: Supplies Ruined
disaster.description: A serious travel mishap damages food, water, medicine, or other important supplies.
disaster.effect: The party loses supplies, takes a resource penalty, or must spend time salvaging what they can.
disaster.dmPrompt: What specific supply is damaged, and who notices the problem first?

disaster.title: Dangerous Misstep
disaster.description: The party makes a costly mistake while navigating the route, putting someone directly in danger.
disaster.effect: The party loses significant time, risks injury, or must overcome an immediate obstacle before continuing.
disaster.dmPrompt: Who is most exposed when the mistake happens?

disaster.title: Exhaustion Sets In
disaster.description: The journey wears the party down harder than expected, leaving them drained before the day is done.
disaster.effect: The party risks exhaustion, reduced watches, or starting the next scene at a disadvantage.
disaster.dmPrompt: Which character is clearly struggling, and who notices?

disaster.title: Roadside Ambush
disaster.description: The party stumbles into a prepared ambush along a vulnerable stretch of road.
disaster.effect: A hostile encounter begins with the enemy holding the better position.
disaster.dmPrompt: Were the attackers waiting for anyone, or did the party simply look like easy prey?

disaster.title: Bridge Failure
disaster.description: A bridge, ferry crossing, or raised path gives way at the worst possible moment.
disaster.effect: The party must find another crossing, repair the route, or risk a dangerous passage.
disaster.dmPrompt: What makes the crossing impossible to ignore?

disaster.title: Lost in Bad Ground
disaster.description: The party loses the trail and wanders into thick, confusing terrain.
disaster.effect: The party loses major progress and may attract danger while trying to recover the route.

disaster.title: Sinking Route
disaster.description: The party commits to a path that gives way beneath them, turning travel into a desperate scramble.
disaster.effect: The party risks losing gear, taking exhaustion, or becoming separated.
disaster.dmPrompt: What does the swamp try to take from them?

disaster.title: Rockslide
disaster.description: Loose stone tears free from above, blocking the path and threatening anyone caught below.
disaster.effect: The party must escape danger, clear a path, or backtrack through worse terrain.
disaster.dmPrompt: Was the slide natural, accidental, or triggered?

disaster.title: Collapsed Passage
disaster.description: A section of ruin collapses, sealing the easy path and stirring up old dust, echoes, and danger.
disaster.effect: The party loses the safe route and must risk a more dangerous way forward.
disaster.dmPrompt: What sound follows the collapse from somewhere deeper inside?

disaster.title: The Wrong Place
disaster.description: The party realizes too late that they have entered a part of the ruins that was deliberately sealed away.
disaster.effect: The party triggers a serious hazard, ancient ward, or hostile attention.
disaster.dmPrompt: What warning sign did they miss until now?

hardship.title: Costly Delay
hardship.description: The party runs into a frustrating delay that does not stop the journey, but makes the day harder.
hardship.effect: The party loses time or must choose between safety and speed.
hardship.dmPrompt: What small problem becomes more annoying than expected?

hardship.title: Bad Camp Options
hardship.description: As the day wears on, every potential campsite has a drawback: exposure, discomfort, poor visibility, or signs of previous danger.
hardship.effect: The party must accept a weaker campsite or spend extra time finding a better one.
hardship.dmPrompt: What makes the first campsite clearly unsafe?

hardship.title: Tense Disagreement
hardship.description: The difficult travel day brings out disagreement about the best route, pace, or risk to take next.
hardship.effect: The party must choose a direction under pressure, with no perfect option.
hardship.dmPrompt: What reasonable argument exists on both sides?

hardship.title: Suspicious Travelers
hardship.description: The party crosses paths with travelers who are not openly hostile, but something about their story does not add up.
hardship.effect: The party can avoid them, question them, or risk being misled.
hardship.dmPrompt: What detail gives away that the travelers are hiding something?

hardship.title: Blocked Wagon
hardship.description: A damaged wagon, fallen load, or stranded group blocks the road ahead.
hardship.effect: The party must help, go around, wait, or risk angering people nearby.
hardship.dmPrompt: Is this an honest problem, bait, or the aftermath of something worse?

hardship.title: Trail Vanishes
hardship.description: The path grows faint beneath leaves, roots, and undergrowth until the party has to slow down and search.
hardship.effect: The party loses progress unless they spend effort tracking or scouting.
hardship.dmPrompt: What clue shows the trail once continued this way?

hardship.title: Biting Insects
hardship.description: Clouds of insects make every stop miserable and every exposed patch of skin a problem.
hardship.effect: The party must cover up, burn supplies, endure discomfort, or risk poor rest.
hardship.dmPrompt: What noise or smell seems to attract the swarm?

hardship.title: Trail Turns Against Them
hardship.description: The climb becomes more punishing than expected, with loose footing and poor visibility.
hardship.effect: The party loses progress unless they slow down or spend resources to continue safely.

hardship.title: Uneasy Silence
hardship.description: The ruins become quiet in a way that makes every movement feel too loud.
hardship.effect: The party remains safe for now, but risks drawing attention if they move carelessly.
hardship.dmPrompt: What sound echoes after the party stops moving?

hardship.title: False Landmark
hardship.description: A familiar-looking marker leads the party in the wrong direction through broken stone and dead passages.
hardship.effect: The party loses time and must decide whether the landmark was accidental or intentionally misleading.
hardship.dmPrompt: Who would benefit from travelers taking the wrong route?

opportunity.title: Useful Shortcut
opportunity.description: The party notices a route that is not obvious at first glance, but could save time.
opportunity.effect: The party may gain extra progress if they accept a manageable risk.
opportunity.dmPrompt: Who or what revealed the shortcut?

opportunity.title: Useful Clue
opportunity.description: The party notices a small detail that hints at a nearby danger, route, settlement, faction, or hidden place.
opportunity.effect: The party gains information that may help them avoid trouble or make a better decision later.
opportunity.dmPrompt: What detail would most travelers overlook?

opportunity.title: Moment of Rest
opportunity.description: The party finds a brief pocket of comfort: shade, clean water, quiet, or protection from the weather.
opportunity.effect: The party may recover morale, improve their next camp, or remove a minor travel penalty.
opportunity.dmPrompt: Why does this spot feel safer than the surrounding area?

opportunity.title: Helpful Traveler
opportunity.description: A friendly traveler shares a warning, rumor, or practical tip about the route ahead.
opportunity.effect: The party gains useful information that can help avoid a future problem.
opportunity.dmPrompt: What does the traveler ask for in return, if anything?

opportunity.title: Fresh Road Signs
opportunity.description: Recently repaired signs, stones, or markers help clarify the route ahead.
opportunity.effect: The party avoids delay and may learn which nearby route is safest.
opportunity.dmPrompt: Who has been maintaining this road?

opportunity.title: Clear Trail Sign
opportunity.description: The party finds reliable signs of passage that help confirm the best route forward.
opportunity.effect: The party avoids confusion and may gain a small travel advantage.
opportunity.dmPrompt: Who made the trail signs, and are they still nearby?

opportunity.title: Firm Ground
opportunity.description: The party discovers a stretch of unexpectedly firm ground through the swamp.
opportunity.effect: The party avoids the worst of the terrain and gains time.
opportunity.dmPrompt: Is the route natural, maintained, or magically preserved?

opportunity.title: High Vantage
opportunity.description: The party reaches a vantage point with a clear view of the route ahead.
opportunity.effect: The party gains information about nearby dangers, landmarks, or alternate paths.
opportunity.dmPrompt: What important detail can only be seen from above?

opportunity.title: Readable Inscription
opportunity.description: A weathered inscription gives the party a hint about the ruin, the region, or a safer way through.
opportunity.effect: The party gains a useful clue or avoids a minor hazard.
opportunity.dmPrompt: What part of the inscription is missing?

opportunity.title: Useful Remains
opportunity.description: Among broken stone and old debris, the party finds something still practical: rope, tools, old markings, or a usable map scrap.
opportunity.effect: The party gains a small resource or advantage for the next obstacle.
opportunity.dmPrompt: Who left it behind, and why was it not taken?

windfall.title: Safe Haven
windfall.description: The party finds a secure place to rest, hidden from danger and sheltered from the worst conditions.
windfall.effect: The party gains a strong campsite, better rest, or protection from a future complication.
windfall.dmPrompt: Who used this haven before them?

windfall.title: Valuable Local Knowledge
windfall.description: The party gains information that changes how they understand the surrounding region.
windfall.effect: The party may bypass a hazard, discover a safer route, or learn about a nearby opportunity.
windfall.dmPrompt: What does this information reveal that the party did not know?

windfall.title: Unexpected Aid
windfall.description: Someone or something nearby makes the journey easier at just the right time.
windfall.effect: The party gains help, guidance, supplies, or warning before a future problem.
windfall.dmPrompt: Why is this aid available now?

windfall.title: Abandoned Cache
windfall.description: The party discovers a hidden travel cache left behind by merchants, scouts, soldiers, or pilgrims.
windfall.effect: The party gains useful supplies, a map clue, or a small treasure.
windfall.dmPrompt: Was the cache forgotten, or is someone coming back for it?

windfall.title: Friendly Waystation
windfall.description: The party finds a small waystation, roadside shrine, toll shelter, or watch post still in usable condition.
windfall.effect: The party gains safe rest, useful news, or a protected place to regroup.
windfall.dmPrompt: Who is responsible for keeping this place standing?

windfall.title: Hidden Glade
windfall.description: The party discovers a quiet glade with fresh water, soft ground, and signs of natural protection.
windfall.effect: The party gains excellent rest or a peaceful place to recover.
windfall.dmPrompt: What small sign suggests the glade is not ordinary?

windfall.title: Dry Causeway
windfall.description: A raised strip of old stone, root, or packed earth cuts safely through the wetland.
windfall.effect: The party bypasses a difficult stretch and gains major progress.
windfall.dmPrompt: Who built or preserved the causeway?

windfall.title: Sheltered Pass
windfall.description: The party finds a protected route through the peaks, hidden from wind and falling stone.
windfall.effect: The party avoids a dangerous section and may reach a better campsite or landmark.
windfall.dmPrompt: What sign shows this pass was once important?

windfall.title: Ancient Waymarker
windfall.description: The party finds an old marker that reveals a protected route through the surrounding area.
windfall.effect: The party gains major progress or avoids a dangerous section of travel.
windfall.dmPrompt: What symbol marks the safe path?

windfall.title: Preserved Chamber
windfall.description: The party discovers a chamber untouched by collapse, weather, or looters.
windfall.effect: The party gains a safe rest point, important clue, or valuable discovery.
windfall.dmPrompt: What has kept this chamber protected?

legendary.title: Blessed Road
legendary.description: For a rare stretch of the journey, everything seems to align in the party's favor: weather, terrain, timing, and luck.
legendary.effect: The party gains a major benefit: exceptional progress, restored morale, a powerful clue, or protection from a future danger.
legendary.dmPrompt: Does this feel like luck, divine favor, old magic, or something watching over them?

legendary.title: Fateful Ally
legendary.description: The party meets someone unusually helpful whose arrival feels almost too perfectly timed.
legendary.effect: The party gains a meaningful ally, guide, warning, or opportunity.
legendary.dmPrompt: Why is this person exactly where the party needs them to be?

legendary.title: The World Opens
legendary.description: The party discovers a route, clue, or opportunity that changes the shape of the journey ahead.
legendary.effect: The party may bypass a major obstacle, reach a destination early, or gain a campaign-level lead.
legendary.dmPrompt: What new possibility does this reveal?

legendary.title: Pilgrim's Blessing
legendary.description: The party encounters a rare blessing left by generations of travelers, saints, pilgrims, or grateful survivors.
legendary.effect: The party gains protection, restored morale, safe passage, or a meaningful omen.
legendary.dmPrompt: What must the party do to honor the blessing?

legendary.title: Hidden Wonder
legendary.description: The party discovers a beautiful hidden place untouched by ordinary travelers.
legendary.effect: The party gains rare information, magical aid, safe rest, or a story-worthy discovery.
legendary.dmPrompt: Why has this place remained hidden until now?

legendary.title: The Swamp Gives Back
legendary.description: Against all expectation, the swamp reveals something precious instead of taking something away.
legendary.effect: The party gains a rare resource, hidden path, rescued NPC, or clue from something preserved in the water.
legendary.dmPrompt: What did the swamp keep safe, and why now?

legendary.title: The Old Path Opens
legendary.description: A route thought lost or impossible reveals itself through the peaks.
legendary.effect: The party bypasses a major obstacle or reaches a place few travelers ever see.
legendary.dmPrompt: What condition caused the path to reveal itself today?

legendary.title: Skyfire Omen
legendary.description: A rare light, starfall, aurora, or stormbreak reveals a secret pattern across the highlands.
legendary.effect: The party gains a powerful clue, safe route, or supernatural advantage.
legendary.dmPrompt: Who else might have seen the same omen?

legendary.title: Echo of the Ancients
legendary.description: Something ancient briefly awakens, not as a threat, but as a gift, guide, or revelation.
legendary.effect: The party gains a powerful clue, blessing, shortcut, or glimpse of forgotten history.
legendary.dmPrompt: What does the ruin show them that no living person remembers?

legendary.title: Door Beneath the World
legendary.description: The party discovers a hidden threshold that should not have been visible from the surface.
legendary.effect: The party gains access to a secret place, major shortcut, lost knowledge, or future adventure hook.
legendary.dmPrompt: Why did the door reveal itself to this party?
